answers: Immigration process varies by country: apply for visa, meet requirements (skills/family/refugee), wait for approval, then relocate.
Popular immigration countries: Canada (Express Entry), Australia (skilled migration), US (green card), UK, and Germany.
Tips: research thoroughly, use official government websites, be wary of scams, and consider consulting an immigration lawyer.
Immigration ki: ek desh theke onno desh e permanently boshe jaowa. Skills, family, ba study er basis e hote pare.
